exercises.question: They seem _____ plenty of money.
exercises.explanation: Động từ 'seem' + to V (to have), không có tân ngữ.

exercises.question: We asked how _____ to the station.
exercises.explanation: Động từ 'asked' + từ để hỏi (how) + to V (to get).

exercises.question: Can you remind me _____ Sam tomorrow?
exercises.explanation: Động từ 'remind' + O (me) + to V (to call), bắt buộc có tân ngữ.

exercises.question: I remember _____ the door. (Tôi nhớ là đã khóa cửa rồi)
exercises.explanation: Remember + Ving: nhớ đã làm gì (đã làm rồi).

exercises.question: I must remember _____ the door before going out. (Tôi phải nhớ khóa cửa)
exercises.explanation: Remember + to V: nhớ phải làm gì (chưa làm).

exercises.question: She stopped _____ as soon as she saw her mother.
exercises.explanation: Stop + Ving: dừng việc gì (dừng việc khóc).

exercises.question: We stopped _____ some water at the supermarket.
exercises.explanation: Stop + to V: dừng lại để làm gì (dừng lại để mua nước).

exercises.question: Would you like something _____?
exercises.explanation: Danh từ 'something' + to V (to eat) để bổ nghĩa.

exercises.question: It's safe _____ this water.
exercises.explanation: It's + adj (safe) + to V (to drink): đánh giá về tính chất.

exercises.question: It was nice of you _____ me to the airport.
exercises.explanation: Nice + of (you) + to V: đánh giá người khác từ hành động của họ.

exercises.question: I'm sorry _____ that your mother isn't well.
exercises.explanation: Sorry + to V: cảm thấy tiếc/buồn khi nghe/biết điều gì.

exercises.question: She's not old enough _____ a driving license.
exercises.explanation: Adj + enough + to V: đủ...để làm gì.

exercises.question: You will be the first person _____.
exercises.explanation: The first/next/last/only + to V: người đầu tiên/tiếp theo/cuối cùng/duy nhất làm việc gì.

exercises.question: I tried _____ him an email but it bounced back.
exercises.explanation: Try + to V: cố gắng làm việc gì (nhưng không thành công).
